articles.title: Litecoin adds 10 million transactions in 10 days, what does it mean for LTH?
articles.description: Litecoin maintained healthy transaction growth despite bearish performance. However, its low weighted sentiment was evidence of the fact that LTC may not have a strong recovery. On 19 December, the Litecoin Foundation announced that it processed over one million transactions within the last 10 days. This meant that the blockchain had processed a total of […]

articles.title: Coinbase hit an all-time low yesterday but says it’s not all bad news. Mostly.
articles.description: The 2023 Crypto Market Outlook report from Coinbase says market players still have a persistent appetite for digital assets.

articles.title: Uniswap to allow users to buy cryptocurrency using debit and credit cards
articles.description: Users of the decentralized exchange will also be able to use bank transfers to purchase crypto.

articles.title: Dogecoin: >$280M exchange wallets as trader points to “the same pattern”
articles.description: The biggest Dogecoin whale moved over $280 million worth of DOGE. DOGE was unable to breakout from decline as famous trader predicted more reds. The address with the largest Dogecoin [DOGE] holdings transferred 3.84 billion of the meme coin, valued at $280.6 million, in the early hours of 20 December. The bagholder, who owned about […]

articles.title: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse Calls Gary Gensler’s Meetings With Sam Bankman-Fried ‘Shameful’
articles.description: The chief executive of Ripple Labs says that former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried’s meetings with U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chair Gary Gensler were “shameful.” Responding to an opinion piece by the Wall Street Journal questioning Gensler’s failure to foresee the FTX collapse, Brad Garlinghouse says it was shameful that the SEC chair was […]

articles.title: Bitcoin Ransoms Aren’t Dead: EV Maker NIO Refuses To Pay Up
articles.description: Hackers are selling sensitive NIO customer data online after the EV maker staunchly denied paying a bitcoin ransom worth millions
